reasoning: High packet loss on the F1-c control plane interface, which is a hard error, was prioritized over volumetric anomalies on E2 and A1 interfaces. Because F1-c is the critical control plane interface between O-CU and O-DU, its degradation causes symptomatic noise across the rest of the network hierarchy.
actionable_steps:
1. Inspect physical and virtual links between O-CU and O-DU for F1-c traffic.
2. Check for MTU mismatches or firewall drops on F1-c interface.
3. Verify health of O-CU signaling process and O-DU F1-c termination point.
